TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang bayi ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 92 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 83 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, Setik 3%, Bunun 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na bayi hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na bayi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na bayi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bayi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bayi hya' ga Knaziy. tay 'llaw na bayi hya' ga Malepa. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βaji ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa knazij. taj ʔllaw na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa malepa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang bayi ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 92 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 83 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, Setik 3%, Bunun 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na bayi hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na bayi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na bayi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bayi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na bayi hya' ga Knaziy. tay 'llaw na bayi hya' ga Malepa. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βaji ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa knazij. taj ʔllaw na βaji ħjaʔ ɣa malepa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
